What I Offer

Services

Comprehensive virtual support tailored to your needs — from inbox zero to flawless project delivery.

01
📋

Administrative Service

Efficient administrative support to keep your business organized and productive — freeing your time for strategic decisions.

  • → Email inbox management and organization
  • → Calendar scheduling and appointment setting
  • → Data entry and spreadsheet management
  • → File and document organization (Google Drive, Dropbox)
  • → Internet research and report preparation
  • → Meeting coordination and reminders
  • → Travel planning and bookings
  • → Document formatting and editing
02
💬

Customer Support

Professional customer support that enhances satisfaction and builds brand loyalty across all touchpoints.

  • → Responding to inquiries via email, chat & social media
  • → Handling complaints and resolving issues
  • → Order processing, tracking and follow-ups
  • → Managing support tickets
  • → Updating customer records and databases
  • → Creating FAQs and help documentation
  • → Escalating complex issues when necessary
  • → Monitoring and reporting customer feedback
03
🎯

Executive Support

High-level executive assistance to help business leaders stay organized, focused and productive every day.

  • → Preparing reports and presentations
  • → Coordinating meetings and communications
  • → Travel planning and itinerary management
  • → Meeting notes and action item tracking
  • → Handling confidential information
  • → Supporting daily executive operations
04
📊

Project Management

Supporting project planning and execution — organizing tasks, tracking progress, and ensuring deadlines are met.

  • → Creating project plans and timelines
  • → Assigning and tracking tasks
  • → Monitoring deadlines and deliverables
  • → Coordinating team communication
  • → Providing progress updates and reports
  • → Following up on pending tasks
  • → Identifying and resolving workflow bottlenecks
